EventDescriptions.EventDescription: HTTP traffic from host {src.host} to host {dst.host} via {protocol} is allowed by the proxy server policy "{datafield1}" and passed through the gateway {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}
HTTP traffic from host {src.host} to host {dst.host} via {protocol} is blocked by the proxy server policy "{datafield1}" and did not pass through the gateway {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}
